expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Let admins manage workspace membership and review audit history.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add membership change audit persistence",
      "description": "As a system administrator, I want membership changes recorded in durable storage so that invite, role, and revoke actions can be reviewed later.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace membership change events are stored with actor, target member, action, and timestamp fields",
        "Audit storage accepts invite, role-change, and revoke event types",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/schema/workspace_audit.sql",
        "src/server/workspaces/auditRepository.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Invite workspace members by email",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite a member by email from workspace settings so that I can grant access without editing the database directly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings include an invite flow that accepts an email address",
        "Submitting a valid invite creates pending membership access for the selected workspace",
        "The invite action records an audit event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspaces/inviteMember.ts",
        "src/ui/workspaces/InviteMemberForm.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Change workspace member roles",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role between viewer, editor, and admin so that access matches current responsibilities.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings expose role choices for viewer, editor, and admin",
        "Changing a role persists the new role and updates the member list display",
        "The role-change action records an audit event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspaces/updateMemberRole.ts",
        "src/ui/workspaces/WorkspaceMembersTable.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Revoke workspace access",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to revoke member access so that former members cannot continue using the workspace.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings provide a revoke action for each current member",
        "Revoking access removes the member from active workspace access lists",
        "The revoke action records an audit event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspaces/revokeMemberAccess.ts",
        "src/ui/workspaces/WorkspaceMembersTable.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Review recent membership changes in settings",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes on the settings page so that I can confirm who changed access and when.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings show a recent membership activity view sourced from audit events",
        "The view includes invite, role-change, and revoke entries with actor and timestamp details",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspaces/listMembershipAuditEvents.ts",
        "src/ui/workspaces/MembershipAuditLog.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
